ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider information */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the score belongs to */,
  "scoring_system" INTEGER /* ID of the scoring system used */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "date_scored" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who recorded the score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the score */,
  "score_status" TEXT /* Status of the score (e.g., 'Active', 'Reviewed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_scoring_system FOREIGN KEY ("scoring_system") REFERENCES scoring_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the scoring system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scoring system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the scoring system */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the scoring system is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the scoring system is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comorbidity */,
  "comorbidity_name" TEXT /* Name of the comorbidity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comorbidity */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code associated with the comorbidity */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the comorbidity (e.g., 'Mild', 'Moderate', 'Severe') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_comorbidities" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comorbidity */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date the comorbidity was diagnosed */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who diagnosed the comorbidity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comorbidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_comorbidities_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the group (e.g., 'None', 'Plus') */,
  "eligible_age" TEXT /* Age range for eligibility (e.g., '18-65') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criteria */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criteria */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria */,
  "criteria_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criteria */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the criteria is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the criteria is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icd_codes" (
  "icd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICD code */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ICD code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ICD code (e.g., 'Diseases of the liver') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_icd_codes" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "icd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ICD code */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the ICD code was assigned */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who assigned the ICD code */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the ICD code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "icd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_comorbidities" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comorbidity */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criteria */,
  "icd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ICD code */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who recorded the score-comorbidity relationship */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the score-comorbidity relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id", "comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_comorbidities_icd_id FOREIGN KEY ("icd_id") REFERENCES icd_codes ("icd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_comorbidities_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_comorbidities_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_comorbidities_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinicians" (
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the clinician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the clinician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the clinician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the clinician */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the clinician's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinician_scores" (
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "date_scored" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the clinician's score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinician_id", "score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ehr_data" (
  "ehr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EHR entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "ehr_data" TEXT /* EHR data */,
  "ehr_type" TEXT /* Type of EHR data (e.g., 'Lab Results', 'Imaging Reports') */,
  "ehr_date" TEXT /* Date the EHR data was recorded */,
  "ehr_source" TEXT /* Source of the EHR data (e.g., 'Hospital X', 'Clinic Y') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ehr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ehr_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
